creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Created attachment 232716
drm amdgpu kernel panic photo

Hello world :-)

I just got kernel panic on 13-STABLE with drm amdgpu 5.4.144.g20220223. Computer was quite loaded by ports build. I managed to make a picture (attached).


FreeBSD hexagon 13.1-STABLE FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE #0 stable/13-n250096-4f69c575996: Fri Mar 25 03:50:58 CET 2022     root@hexagon:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64

 # pkg info drm-fbsd13-kmod
drm-fbsd13-kmod-5.4.144.g20220223
Name           : drm-fbsd13-kmod
Version        : 5.4.144.g20220223
Installed on   : Fri Mar 25 16:35:42 2022 CET
Origin         : graphics/drm-fbsd13-kmod
Architecture   : FreeBSD:13:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : graphics kld
Licenses       : BSD2CLAUSE, MIT, GPLv2
Maintainer     : x11@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/
Comment        : DRM modules for the linuxkpi-based KMS components
Options        :
        DEBUG          : on
        SOURCE         : off
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1300139
Flat size      : 10.8MiB
Description    :
amdgpu, i915, and radeon DRM modules for the linuxkpi-based KMS components.
Currently corresponding to Linux 5.4.144 DRM.
This version is for FreeBSD 13.

WWW: https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/
